name: Princess Shall Prevail
short_description: Princess Shall Prevail is a pseudo 8-bit, top-down hack-and-slash game that takes heavy influence from the genre’s third-person contemporaries and some influence from scrolling shoot-em-ups. Like how many approach the genres, players will be dodging and timing their attacks accordingly.
detailed_description:
Princess Shall Prevail is a pseudo 8-bit, top-down hack-and-slash game that takes heavy influence from the genre’s third-person contemporaries and a bit of influence from scrolling shoot-em-ups. Like how many players approach the modern hack-and-slash genre, players will be dodging and timing their attacks in this game accordingly. There are also features and mechanics unique to this retro-twist to the genre that make it a game of its own.

Beyond the game’s normal mode of play, a randomizer mode is also available to play for players who want an extra challenge or varied subsequent playthroughs. While playing the game in this mode, the enemies who appear will be randomized so that players will be facing a different set of enemies throughout each playthrough.

Features:

- Battle enemies of varying attack patterns

- Pseudo 8-bit graphics and soundtrack

- A built-in randomizer for varied subsequent playthroughs

- Supports Xbox Series, Xbox One, and Xbox 360 controllers (recommended)
